verification_message: All 1 attempts failed (1 strategies x 1 attempts each)
proof_attempts:
induction L generalizing i with
  | nil => simp [partialSums_nil, findIdx_cons]
  | cons l L ih =>
    simp only [flatten_cons, take_append, partialSums_cons, findIdx_cons, getElem?_cons]
    if h : i < l.length then
      simp [h, partialSums_nil]
    else
      have : findIdx (fun x => l.length + x > i) (map length L).partialSums =
             findIdx (fun x => x > i - l.length) (map length L).partialSums :=
        findIdx_congr (fun x _ => by
          simp [Nat.gt_iff_lt, Nat.sub_lt_iff_lt_add (Nat.not_lt.mp h), Nat.add_comm])
      simp [h, this, ih (i - l.length), Nat.not_lt.mp h, Nat.sub_add_cancel]
